principle: External projects provide execution, eval, trace, sandbox, or durable-loop primitives. The kernel keeps the source of truth.

adapters.name: swe_bench_patch_loop
adapters.trust_boundary: Benchmark pass is evidence for the selected scenario, not proof of product readiness.
adapters.not_core_reason: SWE-style loops evaluate patch behavior; they do not define the production protocol.

adapters.name: openhands_sandbox_runtime
adapters.trust_boundary: Sandbox result must be checkpointed as verification evidence before it matters.
adapters.not_core_reason: Runtime execution is replaceable; checkpoint contracts are not.

adapters.name: langgraph_durable_loop
adapters.trust_boundary: Durable executor may resume work, but cannot bypass schema validation or approval gates.
adapters.not_core_reason: The kernel already defines stage state; durable runtime is an implementation choice.

adapters.name: deepeval_promptfoo_opik_eval_trace
adapters.trust_boundary: LLM-as-judge results are advisory unless backed by deterministic fixtures or human approval.
adapters.not_core_reason: Evaluation tools strengthen gates; they do not replace artifact schemas.
